---
description: "Run a WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility review of the portal UI covering semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, colour contrast, ARIA, responsive design, and form accessibility."
agent: "ui-review"
---

Perform a comprehensive UI and accessibility review of the portal:

1. Semantic HTML (landmarks, headings, lists, tables, buttons vs links)
2. Keyboard navigation (focus order, focus visibility, skip links, modal traps)
3. ARIA attributes (labels, expanded states, live regions, error associations)
4. Colour contrast (4.5:1 text, 3:1 UI components, brand colour compliance)
5. Responsive design (320px minimum, touch targets, fluid typography)
6. Loading & error states (skeletons, aria-busy, descriptive errors, empty states)
7. Form accessibility (labels, required indicators, error messages, autocomplete)
8. Design token consistency (Tailwind tokens, no arbitrary values)
9. Images & media (alt text, decorative handling)
10. Internationalisation readiness (text expansion, locale formatting)

Report all findings with WCAG 2.1 success criterion numbers and severity ratings.
